name: gitwarp
description: Worktree isolation, context, and task records for concurrent coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Git worktree isolation and task records for agents
interface.longDescription: Use GitWarp to enter with context, start, inspect, hand off, view, and finish isolated git worktree sandboxes with task dossiers for automated coding agents.
defaultPrompt: Run gitwarp enter --cwd "$PWD" before repository work.
Start an isolated workspace with a GitWarp task dossier for concurrent agent tasks.
Inspect context and read task.md, progress.md, and lessons.md before editing inside a sandbox.
